title: Gift Card Purchase
description: How do I select, customize, and buy an online gift card, including choosing the amount, entering recipient details, and resolving payment errors?
narrative: The user is looking for step‑by‑step information on purchasing a gift card from an e‑commerce site. Relevant material should describe the available denominations, customization fields (recipient name, email, message), the checkout process, and common validation or payment error messages. Documents that list gift‑card options, show sample order forms, or explain how to complete the transaction are relevant, while pages about unrelated gift ideas, general product catalogs, or non‑gift‑card services are not.

title: Lamb Tagine
description: How can I prepare a traditional lamb tagine, including ingredients, spices, and step‑by‑step instructions?
narrative: The user is looking for cooking information about a lamb tagine. Relevant documents are those that provide a complete or partial recipe for lamb tagine—ingredient lists, spice blends, preparation steps, cooking times, and variations (e.g., with prunes, quince, olives, lemon confit, etc.). Content that includes detailed instructions, tips, or photos of the cooking process satisfies the need. Documents that merely mention lamb tagine in passing, discuss travel, restaurant reviews, unrelated TV shows, or other dishes without a recipe are not relevant.

title: Lotus Car Models

narrative: The user is looking for detailed information about Lotus automobiles, including model names (e.g., Evora, Elise, Exige), technical specifications (engine, power, weight, performance), and pricing or market positioning. Documents that describe Lotus model line‑ups, specifications, model revisions, and sales or pricing information are considered relevant, while generic automotive listings that do not mention Lotus or discuss unrelated brands are not relevant.

title: Small Vessel Info

title: War School Info

title: Option Right

narrative: The user seeks a comprehensive explanation of the 'right of option' (droit d'option) as it applies to unemployment benefits in France. title: Potato Late Blight
description: What potato varieties are resistant to late blight and what management practices help control the disease?
narrative: The user is seeking information on late blight (Phytophthora infestans) as it affects potatoes. Relevant material should describe potato cultivars that exhibit resistance or tolerance to late blight, breeding efforts to introduce resistance genes, and agronomic or chemical strategies (e.g., reduced fungicide programs, cultural controls) for managing the disease. Documents that focus on potato variety characteristics, resistance breeding programs, field trials of resistant lines, or integrated disease‑management recommendations are considered relevant. Content unrelated to potatoes (e.g., soybeans, sweet potatoes, fire blight on apples) or that does not address late blight resistance or control is not relevant.
